description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow has four jobs: linux, cppcheck, msys2, and msvc. The linux job compiles on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of clang and gcc compilers, installs dependencies, configures, builds, and packages the project. The cppcheck job runs cppcheck on ubuntu-latest. The msys2 job builds on windows-latest with MSYS2, and the msvc job builds on windows-2019 with MSVC, both configuring, building, packaging, and uploading artifacts.
